title: litsh/Libero-Occ
abstract:
Official repository of paper "LIBERO-Occ: Evaluating and Improving Vision-Language-Action Models under Scene-Induced Occlusion via Viewpoint Imagination"

# LIBERO-Occ LIBERO-Occ is an occlusion-oriented extension of LIBERO for evaluating Vision-Language-Action models under scene-induced occlusion. This repository releases the benchmark assets and the scripts used for Viewpoint Imagination (VIM) training and evaluation. ## Contents ## Benchmark Assets The release contains four LIBERO-Occ suites: - `libero_spatial_occluded` - `libero_goal_occluded` - `libero_object_occluded` - `libero_10_occluded` Each suite has matching files under `benchmark_assets/bddl_files/` and `benchmark_assets/init_files/`. ## Installation Install upstream LIBERO first, then install this repository's Python dependencies and benchmark assets: See [docs/installation.md](docs/installation.md) and [docs/univla_vim_code.md](docs/univla_vim_code.md) for details. ## Train VIM Run the scripts from this repository. By default, they use the bundled `univla/` code. You can also set `UNIVLA_ROOT=/path/to/UniVLA` to run against another checkout. See [docs/training.md](docs/training.md). ## Evaluate VIM on LIBERO-Occ See [docs/evaluation.md](docs/evaluation.md). ## License This repository is released under the MIT License. LIBERO-Occ is built on top of LIBERO; please also follow the license and citation requirements of upstream LIBERO and UniVLA. ## Citation
abstract_zh: LIBERO-Occ是LIBERO的面向遮挡的扩展，用于评估场景诱导遮挡下的视觉-语言-动作模型。本仓库发布了基准测试资产以及用于视角想象（VIM）训练和评估的脚本。内容包括四个LIBERO-Occ套件：libero_spatial_occluded、libero_goal_occluded、libero_object_occluded和libero_10_occluded。每个套件在benchmark_assets/bddl_files/和benchmark_assets/init_files/下有对应的文件。安装需先安装上游LIBERO，再安装本仓库的Python依赖和基准资产。训练VIM默认使用捆绑的univla/代码，也可设置UNIVOLA_ROOT指向其他版本。评估详见文档。
tldr_zh: 提出LIBERO-Occ基准，通过视角想象提升遮挡下视觉-语言-动作模型性能。
cover_zh: 机器人被遮挡就失灵？这个新方法用“视角想象”让模型看穿障碍

judge.reason: 官方benchmark，评估VLA在遮挡下的表现，含VIM训练代码，直接相关操作VLA
